title: Params for key.schedule_deletion
description: Canonical parameters when scheduling a KMS key for permanent deletion. cooldown_days is REQUIRED because every cloud KMS treats this differently and an analyst MUST consciously choose the recovery window: AWS KMS allows 7-30 days, Azure Key Vault soft-delete is 7-90, GCP KMS allows 24h-30d at version-destruction time. Connectors translate this to the vendor-specific call.

cooldown_days.description: Days before the key is permanently destroyed. The connector clamps to the vendor's allowed range and surfaces the effective value in vendor_message.
